_source_audit: 2026-04-17 — CCXT returned 20 chars (JS-rendered, not scrapable), HN Algolia returned 0 hits (query too specific), Investopedia is paywalled. Replaced with reliable open sources.

followUps.item: Model Kelly Criterion against historical trades to find optimal position sizes
Investigate phantom position tracking — why fake positions appear in logs
